translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: How the city sits solitary, that was full of people! She has become as a widow, who was great among the nations! She who was a princess among the provinces has become tributary!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: She weeps bitterly in the night, and her tears are on her cheeks; among all her lovers she has no one to comfort her: All her friends have dealt treacherously with her; they have become her enemies.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Judah has gone into captivity because of affliction, and because of great servitude; she dwells among the nations, she finds no rest: all her persecutors overtook her within the straits.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The ways of Zion mourn, because no one come to the solemn assembly; all her gates are desolate, her priests sigh: her virgins are afflicted, and she herself is in bitterness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Her adversaries have become the head, her enemies prosper; for Yahweh  has afflicted her for the multitude of her transgressions: her young children have gone into captivity before the adversary.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All majesty has departed from the daughter of Zion: her princes have become like deer that find no pasture, they have gone without strength before the pursuer.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Jerusalem remembers in the days of her affliction and of her miseries all her pleasant things that were from the days of old: when her people fell into the hand of the adversary, and no one helped her, The adversaries saw her, they mocked at her desolations.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Jerusalem has grievously sinned; therefore she has become as an unclean thing; all who honored her despise her, because they have seen her nakedness: yes, she sighs, and turns backward.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Her filthiness was in her skirts; she didn’t remember her latter end; therefore she has come down astoundingly; she has no comforter: “See, Yahweh, my affliction; for the enemy has magnified himself.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The adversary has spread out his hand on all her pleasant things: for she has seen that the nations are entered into her sanctuary, concerning whom you commanded that they should not enter into your assembly.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All her people sigh, they seek bread; they have given their pleasant things for food to refresh the soul: “Look, Yahweh, and see; for I have become abject.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “Is it nothing to you, all you who pass by? Look, and see if there is any sorrow like my sorrow, which is brought on me, with which Yahweh has afflicted me in the day of his fierce anger.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “From on high has he sent fire into my bones, and it prevails against them; He has spread a net for my feet. He has turned me back. He has made me desolate and faint all day long.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “The yoke of my transgressions is bound by his hand; They are knit together. They have come up on my neck. He has made my strength to fail. The Lord  has delivered me into their hands, against whom I am not able to stand.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “The Lord has set at nothing all my mighty men within me. He has called a solemn assembly against me to crush my young men. The Lord has trodden as in a wine press the virgin daughter of Judah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “For these things I weep. My eye, my eye runs down with water, because the comforter who should refresh my soul is far from me. My children are desolate, because the enemy has prevailed.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Zion spreads out her hands. There is no one to comfort her; Yahweh has commanded concerning Jacob, that those who are around him should be his adversaries. Jerusalem is among them as an unclean thing.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “Yahweh is righteous; for I have rebelled against his commandment. Please hear all you peoples, and see my sorrow. My virgins and my young men have gone into captivity.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “I called for my lovers, but they deceived me. My priests and my elders gave up the spirit in the city, while they sought food for themselves to refresh their souls.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “See, Yahweh; for I am in distress. My heart is troubled. My heart is turned within me, for I have grievously rebelled. Abroad the sword bereaves. At home it is like death.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “They have heard that I sigh. There is no one to comfort me. All my enemies have heard of my trouble. They are glad that you have done it: You will bring the day that you have proclaimed, and they will be like me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “Let all their wickedness come before you; Do to them as you have done to me for all my transgressions. For my sighs are many, and my heart is faint.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: How has the Lord covered the daughter of Zion with a cloud in his anger! He has cast down from heaven to the earth the beauty of Israel, And hasn’t remembered his footstool in the day of his anger.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The Lord has swallowed up all the habitations of Jacob, and has not pitied: He has thrown down in his wrath the strongholds of the daughter of Judah; He has brought them down to the ground; he has profaned the kingdom and its princes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has cut off in fierce anger all the horn of Israel; He has drawn back his right hand from before the enemy: He has burned up Jacob like a flaming fire, which devours all around.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has bent his bow like an enemy, he has stood with his right hand as an adversary, Has killed all that were pleasant to the eye: In the tent of the daughter of Zion he has poured out his wrath like fire.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The Lord has become as an enemy, he has swallowed up Israel; He has swallowed up all her palaces, he has destroyed his strongholds; He has multiplied in the daughter of Judah mourning and lamentation.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has violently taken away his tabernacle, as if it were of a garden; he has destroyed his place of assembly: Yahweh has caused solemn assembly and Sabbath to be forgotten in Zion, Has despised in the indignation of his anger the king and the priest.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The Lord has cast off his altar, he has abhorred his sanctuary; He has given up into the hand of the enemy the walls of her palaces: They have made a noise in Yahweh’s house, as in the day of a solemn assembly.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh has purposed to destroy the wall of the daughter of Zion; He has stretched out the line, he has not withdrawn his hand from destroying; He has made the rampart and wall to lament; they languish together.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Her gates are sunk into the ground; he has destroyed and broken her bars: Her king and her princes are among the nations where the law is not; Yes, her prophets find no vision from Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The elders of the daughter of Zion sit on the ground, they keep silence; They have cast up dust on their heads; they have clothed themselves with sackcloth: The virgins of Jerusalem hang down their heads to the ground.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My eyes fail with tears, my heart is troubled; My liver is poured on the earth, because of the destruction of the daughter of my people, Because the young children and the infants swoon in the streets of the city.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They ask their mothers, “Where is grain and wine?” when they swoon as the wounded in the streets of the city, when their soul is poured out into their mothers’ bosom.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: What shall I testify to you? what shall I liken to you, daughter of Jerusalem? What shall I compare to you, that I may comfort you, virgin daughter of Zion? For your breach is great like the sea: who can heal you?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Your prophets have seen for you false and foolish visions; They have not uncovered your iniquity, to bring back your captivity, but have seen for you false revelations and causes of banishment.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All that pass by clap their hands at you. They hiss and wag their head at the daughter of Jerusalem, saying, “Is this the city that men called ‘The perfection of beauty, the joy of the whole earth’?”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All your enemies have opened their mouth wide against you. They hiss and gnash the teeth. They say, “We have swallowed her up. Certainly this is the day that we looked for. We have found it. We have seen it.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh has done that which he purposed; he has fulfilled his word that he commanded in the days of old; He has thrown down, and has not pitied: He has caused the enemy to rejoice over you; he has exalted the horn of your adversaries.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Their heart cried to the Lord: wall of the daughter of Zion, let tears run down like a river day and night; Give yourself no respite; don’t let the apple of your eye cease.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Arise, cry out in the night, at the beginning of the watches; Pour out your heart like water before the face of the Lord: Lift up your hands toward him for the life of your young children, that faint for hunger at the head of every street.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “Look, Yahweh, and see to whom you have done thus! Shall the women eat their offspring, the children that are dandled in the hands? Shall the priest and the prophet be killed in the sanctuary of the Lord?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “The youth and the old man lie on the ground in the streets. My virgins and my young men have fallen by the sword. You have killed them in the day of your anger. You have slaughtered, and not pitied.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “You have called, as in the day of a solemn assembly, my terrors on every side. There was no one that escaped or remained in the day of Yahweh’s anger. My enemy has consumed those whom I have dandled and brought up.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I am the man that has seen affliction by the rod of his wrath.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has led me and caused me to walk in darkness, and not in light.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Surely against me he turns his hand again and again all day long.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has made my flesh and my skin old; he has broken my bones.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has built against me, and surrounded me with gall and travail.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has made me to dwell in dark places, as those that have been long dead.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has walled me about, that I can’t go out; he has made my chain heavy.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yes, when I cry, and call for help, he shuts out my prayer.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has walled up my ways with cut stone; he has made my paths crooked.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He is to me as a bear lying in wait, as a lion in secret places.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has turned aside my ways, and pulled me in pieces; he has made me desolate.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has bent his bow, and set me as a mark for the arrow.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has caused the shafts of his quiver to enter into my kidneys.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have become a derision to all my people, and their song all day long.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has filled me with bitterness. He has sated me with wormwood.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has also broken my teeth with gravel stones; he has covered me with ashes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have removed my soul far off from peace; I forgot prosperity.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I said, “My strength has perished, along with my expectation from Yahweh.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Remember my affliction and my misery, the wormwood and the gall.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My soul still remembers them, and is bowed down within me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: This I recall to my mind; therefore I have hope.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It is because of Yahweh’s loving kindnesses that we are not consumed, because his compassion doesn’t fail.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They are new every morning; great is your faithfulness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “Yahweh is my portion,” says my soul. “Therefore I will hope in him.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh is good to those who wait for him, to the soul who seeks him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It is good that a man should hope and quietly wait for the salvation of Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It is good for a man that he bear the yoke in his youth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let him sit alone and keep silence, because he has laid it on him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let him put his mouth in the dust, if so be there may be hope.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let him give his cheek to him who strikes him; let him be filled full with reproach.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Lord will not cast off forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For though he cause grief, yet he will have compassion according to the multitude of his loving kindnesses.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For he does not afflict willingly, nor grieve the children of men.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: To crush under foot all the prisoners of the earth,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: To turn aside the right of a man before the face of the Most High,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: To subvert a man in his cause, the Lord doesn’t approve.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Who is he who says, and it comes to pass, when the Lord doesn’t command it?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Doesn’t evil and good come out of the mouth of the Most High?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Why does a living man complain, a man for the punishment of his sins?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let us search and try our ways, and turn again to Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let us lift up our heart with our hands to God  in the heavens.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “We have transgressed and have rebelled. You have not pardoned.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “You have covered us with anger and pursued us. You have killed. You have not pitied.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have covered yourself with a cloud, so that no prayer can pass through.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have made us an off-scouring and refuse in the middle of the peoples.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “All our enemies have opened their mouth wide against us.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Terror and the pit have come on us, devastation and destruction.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My eye runs down with streams of water, for the destruction of the daughter of my people.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My eye pours down, and doesn’t cease, without any intermission,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: until Yahweh looks down, and sees from heaven.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My eye affects my soul, because of all the daughters of my city.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They have chased me relentlessly like a bird, those who are my enemies without cause.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They have cut off my life in the dungeon, and have cast a stone on me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Waters flowed over my head; I said, I am cut off.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I called on your name, Yahweh, out of the lowest dungeon.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You heard my voice: “Don’t hide your ear from my sighing, and my cry.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You came near in the day that I called on you; you said, “Don’t be afraid.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Lord, you have pleaded the causes of my soul; you have redeemed my life.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh, you have seen my wrong. Judge my cause.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have seen all their vengeance and all their devices against me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have heard their reproach, Yahweh, and all their devices against me,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The lips of those that rose up against me, and their device against me all day long.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You see their sitting down and their rising up; I am their song.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You will render to them a recompense, Yahweh, according to the work of their hands.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You will give them hardness of heart, your curse to them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You will pursue them in anger, and destroy them from under the heavens of Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: How the gold has become dim! The most pure gold has changed! The stones of the sanctuary are poured out at the head of every street.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The precious sons of Zion, comparable to fine gold, How are they esteemed as earthen pitchers, the work of the hands of the potter!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Even the jackals draw out the breast, they nurse their young ones: But the daughter of my people has become cruel, like the ostriches in the wilderness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The tongue of the nursing child clings to the roof of his mouth for thirst: The young children ask bread, and no man breaks it to them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Those who fed delicately are desolate in the streets: Those who were brought up in scarlet embrace dunghills.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the iniquity of the daughter of my people is greater than the sin of Sodom, That was overthrown as in a moment, and no hands were laid on her.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Her nobles were purer than snow, they were whiter than milk; They were more ruddy in body than rubies, their polishing was as of sapphire.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Their appearance is blacker than a coal; they are not known in the streets: Their skin clings to their bones; it is withered, it has become like a stick.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Those who are killed with the sword are better than those who are killed with hunger; For these pine away, stricken through, for want of the fruits of the field.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The hands of the pitiful women have boiled their own children; They were their food in the destruction of the daughter of my people.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh has accomplished his wrath, he has poured out his fierce anger; He has kindled a fire in Zion, which has devoured its foundations.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The kings of the earth didn’t believe, neither did all the inhabitants of the world, That the adversary and the enemy would enter into the gates of Jerusalem.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It is because of the sins of her prophets, and the iniquities of her priests, That have shed the blood of the just in the middle of her.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They wander as blind men in the streets. They are polluted with blood, So that men can’t touch their garments.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “Go away!” they cried to them, “Unclean! Go away! Go away! Don’t touch! When they fled away and wandered, men said among the nations, “They can’t live here any more.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh’s anger has scattered them; he will no more regard them: They didn’t respect the persons of the priests, they didn’t favor the elders.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Our eyes still fail, looking in vain for our help: In our watching we have watched for a nation that could not save.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They hunt our steps, so that we can’t go in our streets: Our end is near, our days are fulfilled; for our end has come.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Our pursuers were swifter than the eagles of the sky: They chased us on the mountains, they laid wait for us in the wilderness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The breath of our nostrils, the anointed of Yahweh, was taken in their pits; Of whom we said, Under his shadow we shall live among the nations.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Rejoice and be glad, daughter of Edom, that dwell in the land of Uz: The cup shall pass through to you also; you shall be drunken, and shall make yourself naked.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The punishment of your iniquity is accomplished, daughter of Zion; he will no more carry you away into captivity: He will visit your iniquity, daughter of Edom; he will uncover your sins.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Remember, Yahweh, what has come on us: Look, and see our reproach.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Our inheritance is turned to strangers, Our houses to aliens.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: We are orphans and fatherless; Our mothers are as widows.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: We have drunken our water for money; Our wood is sold to us.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Our pursuers are on our necks: We are weary, and have no rest.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: We have given the hand to the Egyptians, To the Assyrians, to be satisfied with bread.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Our fathers sinned, and are no more; We have borne their iniquities.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Servants rule over us: There is no one to deliver us out of their hand.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: We get our bread at the peril of our lives, Because of the sword of the wilderness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Our skin is black like an oven, Because of the burning heat of famine.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They ravished the women in Zion, The virgins in the cities of Judah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Princes were hanged up by their hand: The faces of elders were not honored.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The young men bare the mill; The children stumbled under the wood.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The elders have ceased from the gate, The young men from their music.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The joy of our heart is ceased; Our dance is turned into mourning.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The crown is fallen from our head: Woe to us! for we have sinned.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For this our heart is faint; For these things our eyes are dim;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the mountain of Zion, which is desolate: The foxes walk on it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You, Yahweh, remain forever; Your throne is from generation to generation.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Why do you forget us forever, And forsake us so long time?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Turn us to yourself, Yahweh, and we shall be turned. Renew our days as of old.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But you have utterly rejected us; You are very angry against us.
